title: Duel on Coruscant
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Youmayd|the fight between [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|Duel on Coruscant|[[Battle of Coruscant (disambiguation)|Battle of Coruscant]]}} {{Duel |prev=[[Battle of Xagobah (Clone Wars)|Battle of Xagobah]]''[[Boba Fett: Pursuit]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of Kamino (Separatist–Mandalorian invasion)|Battle of Kamino]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |image= |name=Duel on Coruscant |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] |date=[[20 BBY/Legends|19.42 BBY]] (2 [[Standard year/Legends|years]], 7 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]]) |place=[[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] |result=Inconclusive, [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] stops the fight |side1=[[Clan Fett]] |side2=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |side3= |side4= |forces1=[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] |forces2=[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=None |casual2=None |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|You killed my father. I've waited a long time for this, Jedi Windu—but I'm not waiting anymore!''"
"''Who are you?''"
"''On Geonosis, you murdered a warrior named Jango Fett. Jango Fett was my father.|Boba Fett and Mace Windu|}} During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a '''duel''' took place in the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] between the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|This is for you, Father.|Boba Fett|}} After [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] killed [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], Fett's son [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] desired to kill Windu in vengeance. Boba Fett arrived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after arranging to give information vital to the survival of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Fett was escorted to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] to await his appointment but not before agreeing to leave his weapons on [[Slave I/Legends|his ship]]. Once he was left alone, Fett left the Temple and traveled to the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|lower levels]] of Coruscant. In his excursion, Fett received weapons from [[Hat Lo/Legends|Hat Lo]] and a [[Poison dart/Legends|saberdart]] from [[Elan Sel'Sabagno/Legends|Elan Sleazebaggano]] before returning to the Temple. After finding that Windu had already left for his own meeting with the Chancellor, Fett used his [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]] to fly to the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]]. ==The duel== {{Quote|Surrender! Surrender, and I promise you'll receive fair treatment!''"
"''Surrender?''"
"''You have my word.''"
"''And you have my hatred!|Mace Windu and Boba Fett|}} Boba Fett entered Palpatine's level of the Senate Building through a [[Window/Legends|window]] after disabling its [[Alarm system/Legends|alarm]]. Fett proceeded directly to Palpatine's antechamber where he found Mace Windu. Fett fired almost immediately with his [[Flechette pistol/Legends|flechette pistol]]. After Windu dodged the first rounds Fett rushed him and shot Windu's shoulders. The Jedi then [[Force jump/Legends|jumped]] over Fett while igniting [[Mace Windu's lightsaber/Legends|his lightsaber]]. Windu swung the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] twice, grazing Fett's [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|armor]] and knocking the [[Pistol/Legends|pistol]] from his [[Limb/Legends|hands]]. Fett then drew a [[Dagger/Legends|dagger]] and rushed Windu again. The dagger only went through the Jedi's [[Jedi apparel/Legends|robes]] but Fett did manage to punch Windu's [[Rib/Legends|ribs]]. Windu countered by hitting his lightsaber against the hunter's shoulder. At this point, the Jedi Master gave Fett a chance to surrender. Fett returned the dagger to his [[Belt/Legends|belt]], but he was taking the opportunity to release his [[CryoBan grenade/Legends|CryoBan grenade]]. Fett attempted to shoot Windu while he suffered the effects of the blast, and was hit on his arm and [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] when failed. After Fett refused to surrender again, Windu knocked the dagger away. Running out of options, Fett fired the saberdart which Windu merely caught between his fingers. Knowing he had been beaten and wanting to go down fighting, Fett refused the last offer of surrender and raised his [[Flechette/Legends|flechette]] pistol to force Windu to kill him. Just before the last blow could be dealt, Chancellor Palpatine entered the room with his [[Red Guard]]s who ended the fight. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Count Dooku and Tyranus are the same person. Your greatest enemy created your armies. It is a trap.''"
"''I know.|Boba Fett and Palpatine|}} Mace Windu gave an explanation to Palpatine before leaving. Boba Fett was led away into Palpatine's office for his meeting. Afterwards, Palpatine paid Fett with a [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] [[Credit cube|cube]] and had Fett's ship moved to the Senate Building, thus relieving Fett of having to return to the Temple. Fett returned to his ship under escort and left Coruscant immediately. {{Battle-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Boba Fett: Pursuit]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' *{{SW|url=news/so-uncivilized-great-gunslingers-in-star-wars-part-1|series=So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Coruscant, duel on}} [[Category:Battles of the Senate]] [[Category:Duels]] [[Category:Events during the Clone Wars]]
